items.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher As President Trump Announces $500 Billion AI Project: Oracle, Netflix, Nvidia Among Top Stocks To Watch
items.author: Rounak Jain
items.description: U.S. stocks are expected to open higher as President Trump announces a $500 billion AI project involving Oracle, Microsoft's OpenAI, and SoftBank. Key stocks to watch include Oracle, Netflix, and Nvidia.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Oracle is part of the $500 billion AI project announced by President Trump, which is expected to have a positive impact on the company's business.
Netflix stock surged over 14% in premarket trading after the company reported strong subscriber growth and a price hike, indicating a positive outlook.
Nvidia and other chip stocks gained in premarket trading after the announcement of the AI project, suggesting a positive sentiment for the company.
The Invesco QQQ ETF, which tracks the Nasdaq-100 index, rose 0.77% in premarket trading, indicating a positive sentiment for the overall tech sector.
The SPDR S&P 500 ETF, which tracks the S&P 500 index, gained 0.37% in premarket trading, suggesting a positive sentiment for the broader market.
